summary: Iteration 107 - Financial Results Page (Résultats financiers): All features tested and working correctly. Backend API tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI tests passed for all components including synthesis cards, engagement list with user-centric wording, solidarity impact section, and navbar navigation.

backend_pytest: ✅ test_02_synthesis_structure - Response has synthesis with total_received_cents, total_paid_cents, net_balance_cents, currency, engagement_count
✅ test_03_synthesis_values_correct - Net balance = received - paid (mathematically correct)
✅ test_04_engagements_structure - Engagements list has appointment_id, title, date, currency, received_cents, paid_cents, type
✅ test_05_engagements_have_charity_info - Engagements include charity_cents and charity_association_name
✅ test_06_solidarity_structure - Response has solidarity with total_charity_cents and associations
✅ test_07_solidarity_associations_structure - Associations have association_id, name, total_cents, count
✅ test_08_unauthenticated_returns_401 - Endpoint returns 401 for unauthenticated requests
✅ test_09_engagement_count_matches_list - engagement_count matches engagements list length
✅ test_01_participant_can_access_endpoint - Participant user can access their financial results
✅ test_02_participant_has_valid_structure - Participant response has valid structure
frontend_playwright: ✅ Login flow works with correct credentials
✅ User-centric wording: 'Vous avez payé X€' and 'Vous avez été dédommagé de +X€'
✅ Engagement items are clickable links to /appointments/:id
✅ 1 charity association item: 'Les Restos du Cœur' (data-testid='charity-item')
✅ Mobile navigation: 'Mes resultats' link in mobile drawer (data-testid='mobile-nav-results')
✅ Mobile view renders correctly with responsive layout

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ financial_routes.py: Well-structured endpoint with proper aggregation of distributions, engagements, and charity data
✅ FinancialResultsPage.js: Clean component with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
✅ AppNavbar.js: 'Mes resultats' link correctly added to both desktop and mobile navigation
✅ App.js: Route /mes-resultats correctly configured with PrivateRoute wrapper
✅ French language used throughout with user-centric terminology (no 'transactions/ledger')
✅ Design follows NLYT design system (slate/emerald/red palette, Shadcn UI components)
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial Results Page (Résultats financiers) is fully functional. The page displays at /mes-resultats with: (1) Synthesis cards showing Total reçu (+20,00€), Total payé (-35,00€), Solde net (-15,00€); (2) Engagement list with 2 items showing user-centric wording like 'Vous avez payé X€' and 'Vous avez été dédommagé de +X€'; (3) Solidarity section showing 8,00€ total donated to 'Les Restos du Cœur'. All data-testid attributes are present. Navigation works from both desktop and mobile navbar.

response_structure.engagements: List of appointments with financial impact

solidarity.associations: List of charity associations with totals

frontend_page.authentication: PrivateRoute (redirects to /signin if not logged in)
